title: Midnight Industries
description: Midnight Industries is a 1.18.2 Quilt modpack built around the vampire playstyle, that features a smattering of dark magic and heaps of tech.
body:
**Midnight Industries** is a **1.18.2 Quilt** modpack built around the **vampire playstyle**, that features a smattering of **dark magic** and **heaps of tech**.

**You begin as a newly turned vampire** (*Haema*), and you may set yourself up with **industrialized automation and machines** (*Industrial Revolution, Tech Reborn*), or perhaps **study some dark arts** (*Bewitchment*) or further your knowledge of the **powers of blood** to **facilitate further automation** (*Stylish Occult*). **Find crashed meteors from space** and acquire **new resources and technologies** from worlds beyond (*Ad Astra!, Applied Energistics 2*). **Decorate your vampire lair** with **beautiful furniture and tons of blocks** (*Adorn, Another Furniture, Chipped*), and explore the world and find **new vistas and structures** (*Traverse, Terrestria, Mo' Structures, Repurposed Structures*). There's **more** to discover, if you dare sink your fangs in.

 

**Credits**:
The iron chest retextures come from the Iron Chests mod for forge, and the emerald retexture was done by myself.
The pack's logo was also made by myself.

**Additional Mod Credit**:
- [Xaero's Minimap](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/xaeros-minimap) and [Xaero's World Map](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/xaeros-world-map) *by xaero96*
- [Quarry Reborn](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/quarry-reborn) *by TED_inc and Dissi_nl*
- [Bewitchment](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/bewitchment) *by MoriyaShiine, cybercat5555, Aelpecyem, and Samaritans07*
